text:
With the Paris 2024 Olympics on the horizon, Ferdinand Omanyala, Africa's record holder in the 100m sprint, is meticulously honing his skills at the Miramas training camp in France.Embracing a new strategy and mindset, Omanyala is determined to seize the crown in what promises to be a fiercely contested men's 100m showdown.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Paris Olympics: Omanyala vows he will not feel Games' heat like it was in Tokyo
author: Ochieng Oyugi
description: He flopped in the last Olympics and vows to assert himself in a few weeks
